content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(4, 7, 0), (1, 3, 1), (7, 8, 1), (0, 7, 2), (4, 5, 4), (0, 1, 5), (3, 4, 5), (3, 8, 6), (5, 6, 6), (5, 7, 6), (0, 9, 8), (2, 7, 9), (2, 6, 12), (5, 8, 22), (3, 6, 23), (1, 9, 26), (2, 5, 26), (4, 9, 27)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 8 exactly at time 22.

We scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 22:

* Edge (4, 7, 0) has node 4 and time 0. -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 3, 1) has node 1 and time 1. -> Add node 3.
* Edge (7, 8, 1) has node 7 and time 1. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (0, 7, 2) has node 0 and time 2. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (4, 5, 4) has node 4 and time 4. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (0, 1, 5) has node 0 and time 5. -> Add node 1.
* Edge (3, 4, 5) has node 3 and time 5. -> Add node 4.
* Edge (3, 8, 6) has node 3 and time 6. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (5, 6, 6) has node 5 and time 6. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 7, 6) has node 5 and time 6. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 9, 8) has node 0 and time 8. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 7, 9) has node 2 and time 9. -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 6, 12) has node 2 and time 12. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 8, 22) has node 5 and time 22. -> Add node 8.
* Edge (3, 6, 23) has node 3 and time 23. -> Add node 6.
* Edge (1, 9, 26) has node 1 and time 26. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (2, 5, 26) has node 2 and time 26. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (4, 9, 27) has node 4 and time 27. -> Add node 9.

The nodes matched are 3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 16, 19, 22, 23, 26, and 27.

Answer: [3, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 12, 16, 19, 22, 23, 26, 27]
